subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath shown us His straight Path, and His mighty Command, and taught us the testimony whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی عرفنا سبیله المستقیم و امره العظیم و علمنا الشهاده التی بها
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @review of publications, @transcendence; unknowability of God
